allow: Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python runAiBot.py 2>&1 | tee bot_run.log)
Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && pip freeze | grep anthropic >> requirements.txt 2>&1)
Bash(find D:/coding/JobApplier -name "*.pyc" -delete && find D:/coding/JobApplier -name "__pycache__" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "Cache cleared")
Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && pip list | grep -i pdf 2>&1)
Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && pip freeze | grep pypdf >> requirements.txt)
